decisions.rationale: Observation represents MTA New York City Transit, which matches existing registry record entity_mta-nyct (entity_name: 'MTA New York City Transit', entity_type: 'agency'). Observation's base_record_id is already entity_mta-nyct and describes the same real-world entity. No link to a different registry record is needed.

Observation represents NYC DOT, matching existing registry record entity_nyc-dot (entity_name: 'New York City Department of Transportation', entity_type: 'agency'). Observation's base_record_id is already entity_nyc-dot. This is a known, resolved entity.
